programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Jesse, alone in the tower, can't assist a drowning man as all lifeguards are busy in the water.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Maxi responds to a tunnel fire. Harrison and Jethro attend to a girl found facedown with no pulse.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: An elderly lady suffers a seizure. A bizarre injury occurs involving a dog and a man's wounded manhood.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Lifeguards try conquer their fear of sharks and must recover the body of a young man found dead in the surf.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: When surfer Damo is treated for a spinal injury, lifeguards fear the worst.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Julie learns the ropes on Bondi. A man confronts a photographer taking pictures of his topless girlfriend.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: New Years Eve brings drunk swimmers, buggy thieves and shark sightings prompting a beach evacuation of 40,010.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: A Bondi summer ends with the apprehension of perverts, bag thieves and an unexpected COVID lockdown.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Tommy rescues intoxicated tourists. Reidy pursues creeps on the beach. A Danish backpacker bares all on Bondi.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Harrison saves a Korean tour group caught in a rip. Reidy attempts to become the greatest Bondi Santa.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: The Rooster NRL team injure Yatesy on a rescue board. A teenager breaks her nose. Luke rescues a deaf patient.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: A seizure on the sand challenges Kerrbox, while a new trainee's attitude raises concerns among lifeguards.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Family members watch as lifeguards attempt to resuscitate two people from the same family.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: On the hottest day ever in Bondi, a fight erupts on the beach. A couple is swept half a kilometre out to sea.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: A suspected body is sighted in the water. Ryan bogs the buggy. Jethro dislocates his shoulder on the jet ski.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: A torrential downpour sparks a flood on the beach and Tommy saves Christmas Day again.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: New Year's festivities turn dark with a teenage drug overdose and mass rescues.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Hoppo shows newbies how to perform a mass-rescue single handedly. Trainee Burkey faces his first drowning.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: A Bondi local is found face down, unresponsive in the sand. Singlets is flocked by seagulls in the buggy.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: A surfer suffers a serious fin chop and Will attempts to run for 48 hours with no sleep.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: A lighting strike survival. A young spinal patient hits Singlets too close to home. Gavin bogs the buggy.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Troy rescues a young girl. Glick takes Kerrbox, who is afraid of heights, up in a helicopter.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Reidy attends a deja vu rescue. A boy is missing. Lifeguards deal with blue bottle invasions and mass rescues.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: A drunk woman goes missing. The most critical rescue of the season stirs up emotional memories for Terry.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Harries plays matchmaker for Singlets. Lifeguards save 7 people caught in two separate rips.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: A young local suffers a serious skating accident. Festive spirit turns deadly with alcohol affected swimmers.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: As lifeguards try bring back a woman found lifeless between the flags, her mentally impaired son arrives.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: The surf club rescue boat collides with a reef. A boy howls in pain, suffering a mystery stomach illness.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Chase mans the tower alone, and Dylan deals with a spinal incident. Off the beach, Hoppo apprehends a thief.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Lifeguards attend a deep water spinal rescue, and try catch a rat that’s been eating cables in their buggies.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Lifeguards deal with drug and alcohol affected masses. Nicola loses her cool with beach goers.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: New lifeguard Will attends to an unconscious teen. Harries helps tame a fleet of giant inflatables.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: A 2 year old girl is trapped in a locked car. Lifeguards chase a bag thief. Swimmers go under after hours.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: A German tourist breaks his back, and trainees Taco and Jesse compete in the annual lifeguard challenge.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: A backpacker has a violent seizure for over 15 minutes. Sam attempts a daring move during a dangerous rescue.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Chappo rushes in for a life and death rescue in the monster swells, but things don’t go as planned.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Lifeguards investigate a floating object a kilometre offshore, Mario rescues a woman on an inflatable tomato.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: New trainee Tommy volunteers to catch a sea snake. Jesse clears the water to save an unresponsive man.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Bluebottles attack Bondi. Mouse handles a missing boy, a dislocated shoulder, and a drug overdose.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Lifeguards search for a couple who were washed off rocks. Joel rescues a family of four in the flagged area.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Singlets returns to work, Pierre from Hong Kong meets the lifeguards and Hoppo teaches kids rip safety.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Lifeguards face frustrating distractions involving lost gear, wayward children, ball games, and somersaults

programme.title: Bondi Rescue

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: A car falls onto a busy walking track and a pervert flees police. The Annual Lifeguard Race is on.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Big waves come to Bondi and Maxi hits trouble during a daring jetski rescue.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Lifeguards conduct an experiment, attempting to combat the lack of beachgoers reading dangerous current signs.

programme.desc: Lifeguards respond to a suspected heart attack. Two green whistles are used for a dislocated shoulder.

programme.desc: New Years brings Snoop Dogg, rips rescues, a girl crying wolf and a helicopter search for a missing swimmer.

programme.desc: Singlets treats a severely dislocated knee. Conan O’Brien tries his hand at lifeguarding.

programme.desc: Harry loses his temper so Hoppo tests lifeguards' customer service skills with a "mystery shopper".

programme.desc: Bondi Beach lifeguards face new challenges and make daring rescues patrolling Australia's most famous beach.

programme.desc: Lifeguards assist a concussed boy who suffered a seizure, and a woman hit by a car. Karlie Kloss visits Bondi.

programme.desc: Jesse rescues a vicious rat from the skate bowl and lifeguards deal with a punch-up in the surf break.

programme.desc: A man comes to lifeguards with a deep stab wound. A man is brought to shore with no feeling in his lower body.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue

programme.title: Bondi Rescue

programme.title: Bondi Rescue

programme.title: Bondi Rescue

programme.title: Bondi Rescue

programme.desc: Cyclonic swell hits Bondi Beach with 12-foot waves. H lectures drunken youths. New drone technology is tested.

programme.desc: Officers conduct a sting using a decoy vehicle. A man with a knife flees the scene of a dispute with his baby mama. Deputies are dispatched when a man is assaulted with a shovel over twenty dollars.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect goes out to get his haircut and winds up in jail. Officers try to piece together a puzzling street fight between a boxer and his confused friend. Cops give a suspect every chance to admit to his obvious crime.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: At the conclusion of an extensive pursuit, the driver eventually loses control and runs into a stop sign. Officers stop a stolen vehicle leaving a known drug house.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers respond to an assault call which escalates to car chase and the eventual arrest of two suspects. Officers spot a known drug dealer who uses a troubling method to conceal his narcotics. An officer curbs a heckler outside a popular bar.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A couple flees a routine traffic stop. An intoxicated woman climbs a tree. Construction workers are pulled over for a hand-to-hand transaction.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers pursue two suspects who were believed to have been involved in a robbery. Police attend to a man who has injected a concerning amount of methamphetamine. Officers break up a fight in progress involving two men outside a convenience store.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies pursue a man involved in a carjacking. Deputies are called to an altercation between a father and son. Officers respond to an unresponsive woman lying in a roadway.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect plays it cool when officers try to match a gun to his holster. Poor choices in a parking lot inspire a life coaching moment. Cops respond to a call and learn that good neighbors do exist.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies assist an injured woman who vows revenge on her male attackers. A woman tells Deputies her husband beat her in front of their children. Officers protect an elderly woman from an abusive child.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A feisty cyclist gives a team of officers a bloody fight. A scared caregiver attempts to evict an unwanted helper from her patient’s house. Mysterious tinfoil lands an unlicensed driver in hot water.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An Officer spots a gun in a vehicle during a routine traffic stop, but the passengers are denying ownership. An intoxicated woman assaults her step-father with a butter knife after he refuses to take her to the hospital for spider bites. A man denies vandalizing a building even though there's evidence on his fingers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An irate Wal-Mart shopper won't listen and goes home with the taser special. An incoherent ex-marine struggles to explain why he decked a man. A routine traffic stop yields a truckload of dogs and an undressing maniac.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers pursue a man who attempted to cash a bad check then fled the scene. Police are called when a man’s ex-girlfriend breaks into his house. Police chase an unlicensed teen speeding in a vehicle

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A fleeing suspect takes officers on a wild chase through oncoming traffic. Surveillance footage of a stabbing helps police find the vicious attacker. Cops track a subject into an uncooperative stranger’s apartment.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An attempted pull over results in a foot chase and eventual arrest. An officer makes a drug-related arrest during a routine traffic stop. An officer makes a sizeable drug seizure during a field sobriety check.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A defiant motorist can’t believe it when his mother sides with the law. Deputies discover a man in a strange costume during a traffic stop. Officers protect a hardworking mom from sudden visitors.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect claims he would have gotten away with his crime if it hadn't been for his girlfriend. Officers are called when a mother’s job hunt unravels. Deputies confront a nervous man with bad habits.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A driver bails out of his vehicle after an attempted traffic stop, the suspect is ultimately tased and arrested. An officer assists with a fight call on the Las Vegas Strip. A Florida man is arrested after an unlikely story is deemed inaccurate.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police investigate a possible abduction at a trailer park. A man in a stolen truck is pulled over and Officers discover washed checks and drug paraphernalia. A suspect is arrested after abandoning a stolen vehicle behind a fast food restaurant.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect flees as officers respond to a fight call. A belligerent meth user refuses to cooperate after being pulled over. A cranky husband gets busted for pot after his wife kicks over his Harley.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A couple out for some fun get into trouble when they can’t wait to get home. The deputies of Alameda County set up a prostitution sting in a local hotel. Two women walking down Las Vegas Boulevard are stopped with suspicious drinks.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers pursue an SUV on the freeway. Deputies are called after an agitated man arms himself with scissors. A driver tells officers the illegal items found in his car was left by a friend.

programme.title: VANTA Blackwater Team Cup
programme.desc: The Vanta Black Water Team Cup brings an unprecedented level of competition to the Cayman Islands, featuring 16 of the top professionals from the APP Tour. This event represents a unique convergence of world-class APP talent, innovative team competition,and a premier global pickleball destination. The Vanta Black Water Team Cup is set to deliver elite-level play, intense rivalries, and an unforgettable spectator experience in Grand Cayman.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: The high-stakes action continues on Day 9 with the Second Semi-Final of the World Pickleball League (WPBL), featuring Pune United against Mumbai Pickle Power. The air is thick with anticipation, especially with the major news that Mumbai's star player, Brandon Lane, may not be available for the matchup.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA)
programme.desc: Live from Virginia Beach, this Round of 16 matchup from the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 features Penn State battling Liberty University for a spot in the quarterfinals. With a bid to the National Championship on the line, the stakes are incredibly high in this win-or-go-home match.The contest goes the distance, pushing both teams to their limits. After splitting the initial six games 3-3, the match culminates in a dramatic Sudden Death Dreambreaker (Game 7). Watch standout performances from Liberty's John McCutcheon and Anneliese Brielle, who fight to keep their team alive, and Penn State's Caitlin Hartman and Theodore De Sousa, who deliver clutch plays under pressure.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball
programme.desc: In this fun night of Tuesday Night Pickleball, the Scottsdale Scorchers go up against the Surprise Stingers!

programme.title: Breaking Pickleball
programme.desc: Meet Michael Loyd and the Peoria Pythons.

programme.title: Picklebowl 2022
programme.desc: Heisman Trophy winner Danny Wuerffel teams up with pickleball pro Kyle Yates to take on filmmaker Doug Ellin and pro Wes Burrows in this exciting Picklebowl 2022 semifinal. Set on the scenic courts of Sea Island, Georgia, this match blends high-level pickleball with star power and charitable competition. Expect fierce play, fun commentary, and standout moments from both sides.

programme.title: NPL
programme.desc: The Kansas City Stingers face off against the Seattle United in a men's match.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023
programme.desc: Men’s Pro Singles between Yates Johnson and William Sobek in the Pre-Medal match

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023
programme.desc: Lalani Bates and Susannah Barr take on Amanda Studnicki and Cass Hoag in this Women's Pro Doubles Quarterfinal.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023
programme.desc: Eva Welsher & Kyle Yates faced off against Milan Rane & Mircea Morariu in a Mixed Pro split age Quarterfinal match.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2019
programme.desc: April 28, 2019 - May 4, 2019 at the East Naples Community Park in Naples, Florida

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023
programme.desc: Suzanne LeBlang and Teresa Tarn go up against Eva Welsher and Angela Simon in the Women's Senior Pro Doubles Semifinals.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025
programme.desc: Watch a Mixed Pro Age pickleball match between the team of Shelby Bates and a partner against the team of Rob Contratto and Renee Chang. This video highlights a matchup of athletes with diverse athletic backgrounds. The caption file reveals that Rob Contratto was a professional ice hockey player and Renee Chang played rugby and soccer in college. Catch all the dinks, volleys, and strategic plays as these two teams battle it out.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: The road to the championship reaches a fever pitch at Mumbai's Jio World Garden for the second semifinal of the World Pickleball League Season 2. In this high-stakes "penultimate tie," the defending champion Bengaluru Jawans face off against a hungry Delhi Dilwale squad led by coach Wesley Gabrielsson. Witness a clash of styles as the dominant Katerina Stewart, who has lost only one match all season, battles the passionate Alejandra Lopez in a critical women's singles opener. Tactical brilliance is on full display as Max Mantor and Trang Huynh attempt to dismantle the Jawans' defense in a high-scoring mixed doubles "exhibition". With every strategic "Pickle Play" and intense baseline rally potentially deciding who advances to the grand finale, the atmosphere is electric and the margins for error are razor-thin.

programme.title: Pickleball England
programme.desc: In this Men’s Doubles Open Group C clash, Tom Turney and Sam Chajul take on Jamie Basford and Peter Hitchman. Watch as smart defense, aggressive drives, and well-timed net play define this intense showdown at the 2023 English Nationals. A standout match that reflects the growing depth of talent in British pickleball.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA)
programme.desc: The grand finale of the 2025 NCPA Utah Regional Championship, the second of six regionals for the season. The rivalry matchup features the top teams from Utah Valley University and Utah Tech.This broadcast highlights the intense Men's Doubles game, where Utah Tech's star player Liam Duffin—hailed as one of the top collegiate players nationwide—teams up with Clayton Boydston to face Utah Valley's duo of Bryce Larson and Charles Case.The stakes are high: teams are competing for $5,000 in scholarship money and a coveted bid to the National Championship in St. Louis, Missouri, where $30,000 is on the line. Ultimately, Utah Tech's first team prevails, taking home the national bid and the Utah Regional title.

programme.title: DUPR Collegiate National Championship
programme.desc: Witness a high-stakes semifinal showdown at the 2025 DUPR Collegiate National Championships as the Texas Longhorns take on the Grand Canyon University Antelopes. Despite predictive analytics giving them a 0% win probability, the GCU "Antelopes" display elite "Skills" early on, jumping to a dominant 11-1 lead against the professional-level talent of the Longhorns. The "Racing" tempo of the match is fueled by a relentless GCU crowd that puts immense pressure on Texas stars like Zoya Khan and Natalie Loo. With the defending champions already sidelined, both teams showcase "Freestyle" grit and creativity in a battle to crown a brand-new national champion.

programme.title: VANTA Blackwater Team Cup
programme.desc: The Vanta Black Water Team Cup brings an unprecedented level of competition to the Cayman Islands, featuring 16 of the top professionals from the APP Tour. This event represents a unique convergence of world-class APP talent, innovative team competition,and a premier global pickleball destination. The Vanta Black Water Team Cup is set to deliver elite-level play, intense rivalries, and an unforgettable spectator experience in Grand Cayman.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball
programme.desc: December 13, 2022 - Live from The Orchard @ Jigsaw Health, it's Tuesday Night Pickleball

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024
programme.desc: Christine Karges and David Weinbach take on Lee Whitwell and Jaime Oncins in this Mixed Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023
programme.desc: Senior Pro Singles Gold Medal match between Paul Olin and Rick Witsken.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024
programme.desc: In this alternate cut of the Women’s Split Pro Doubles Quarterfinal at the 2024 US Open, Suzanne Leblang & Milan Rane face off against Martina Frantova & Christine Karges in a battle of shot placement, net pressure, and quick resets. Filmed in Naples, Florida, this matchup delivers a new perspective on one of the tournament’s most tactical and fast-paced doubles clashes.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025
programme.desc: Watch a thrilling Mixed Pro Doubles pickleball match between the top-seeded team of Megan Fudge and Jack Munro against Peichuan Kao and Ryler DeHeart. Megan Fudge is a highly-ranked professional player who previously played tennis at the University of Illinois, where she met her husband and partner, Ryler DeHeart. DeHeart is a former professional tennis player who is left-handed. Their opponents are Peichuan Kao, a professional pickleball player who won gold at the APP Fort Lauderdale Open, and Jack Munro, a young pro who was the youngest to become a professional at age 12.

programme.title: NPL
programme.desc: The stakes are sky-high in this 2024 National Pickleball League Women’s Doubles Championship as the Coachella Valley Scorpions' dynamic duo, Molly Carter and Kelly Ojeda, take on the formidable Denver Iconics pairing of Stacy Zelenski and Lily Kordic Mueller. Filmed at a championship stop on the NPL tour, this intense match features fierce net battles, pinpoint placement, and relentless energy on both sides of the court. Watch as Carter & Ojeda push the pace and mount a relentless offensive, while Zelenski & Kordic Mueller counter with sharp angles and strategic resets. A hard-fought final that captures the spirit, skill, and teamwork of professional women’s pickleball.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023
programme.desc: Watch the Gold Medal match of the Women’s Pro Split Age division at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships, where Parris Todd and Beth Bellamy team up to face Sheri Courter and Mari Humberg. Featuring cross-generational strategy, fast hands, and smart positioning, this match highlights the unique synergy of Split Age play. Recorded live from Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: The action continues on Day 2 of the World Pickleball League (WPL) with the highly anticipated second matchup: Delhi takes on Mumbai Pickle Power at the CCI Brabourne Stadium in Mumbai.This matchup features a spectacular lineup, including Delhi's players Alexa Schule, Eduardo Irizarry, and Willie Chung, against a strong Mumbai squad that includes Brandon Lane, Glauca Lane, and Kim Ngo.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024
programme.desc: Jaime Oncins and Simone Jardim take on Dave Weinbach & Mari Humberg in this Mixed Pro Split Age Semifinal match.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: Experience the electric intensity of the "Maharashtra derby" as local rivals Pune United and Mumbai Pickle Power clash at the Jio World Garden in a match hailed as one of the season's best. Mumbai ignites the home crowd with a dominant early lead, fueled by Jada Bui’s emotional victory over a "fearful" Katie Morris and a clinical masterclass from Brandon and Glauca Carvajal Lane in mixed doubles. However, the tide turns in a dramatic "tale of two halves" as Pune United mounts a stunning comeback. Witness the high-power precision of Bolin Bako as he derails Max Green’s momentum, sparking a relentless surge that sees Pune sweep the final three matches to snatch victory from the jaws of defeat. This tie is a masterclass in team resilience and tactical pressure under the lights in Mumbai.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: The World Pickleball League (WPBL) action heats up on Day 4 with a crucial clash between the Hyderabad Superstars and Mumbai Pickle Power at the CCI Brabourne Stadium. The commentary team emphasizes that the winner of this tie has the potential to go level on points with the table toppers, making this a vital match for semi-final qualification.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023
programme.desc: At the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida, Tina Pisnik and Tammy Emmrich square off against Alix Truong and Milan Rane in the Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal match. Expect aggressive shot-making, quick court coverage, and intense chemistry on both sides as these athletes leave it all on the court.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024
programme.desc: In this intense Gold Medal Match from the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, Marcello Jardim takes on Marco Osorio in a thrilling Men’s Pro Singles showdown. With sharp baseline play, quick hands at the net, and relentless rallies, this match captures the competitive spirit and elite talent of pro pickleball at its finest.

programme.title: European Pickleball Championship
programme.desc: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, concludes its first day with the historic Men's Singles Open Final under the floodlights. England's captain James Chaudry, the only active European player with a DUPR rating over 6.0, faces off against Poland's Bartosz Karbownik (referred to as Kabosnik/Kabashnik in audio).Chaudry dominates early with a mix of power and precise cross-court angles, taking the first game decisively. While Karbownik produces moments of brilliance, including a spectacular passing shot, he struggles with his footing on the clay surface. Witness Team England secure the gold medal in the inaugural singles event of the championships.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: The World Pickleball League Season 2 continues its high-energy opening day at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai with a star-studded clash between Delhi Dilwale and the Chennai Super Champs. Watch as international stars like Delhi’s Max "Purple Jesus" Manthao and Chennai’s Hwang Nam Lee—a former Wimbledon junior doubles champion—bring world-class precision to the court. With celebrity co-owner Samantha cheering from the sidelines and strategic masterclasses from coach Wesley Gabrielsson, this tie features a gauntlet of intense Women’s Singles, Men's Singles, and high-speed Doubles matches. Experience every "Ernie" shot, tactical "pickle play," and the longest video challenge in league history as these two powerhouse teams battle for early-season dominance.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball
programme.desc: December 12, 2023 - Welcome to the second round of the semi-finals for season 2 of The Arizona Pickleball League! It's Tuesday Night Pickleball @ The Orchard, and the Gilbert Gladiators face-off against the Scottsdale Scorchers.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: Day 7 of the World Pickleball League brings a critical and dramatic game between Mumbai Pickle Power and the Bengaluru Jawans. The game begins with a highly anticipated Men's Singles match featuring Mumbai's American star Brandon Lane against Bengaluru's Jack Foster. The match lives up to the hype, showcasing fierce action.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: The World Pickleball League returns for an explosive Season 2 at the iconic Jio World Garden in BKC, Mumbai. The season opener features a high-stakes rematch of last year's final: the defending champion Bengaluru Jawans, owned by cinematic powerhouse Atlee and Priya Atlee, take on the formidable Pune United, led by owner Riteish Deshmukh. Witness world-class athletes from 18 countries compete in a series of intense Men’s Singles, Women’s Doubles, and Mixed Doubles matches. With the pressure of a "Davis Cup" atmosphere and the precision of tactical "kitchen" play, both teams battle for every point to establish early dominance in India’s premier pickleball league.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025
programme.desc: Get ready for a thrilling Pro Mixed Doubles match featuring the number one ranked team of Megan Fudge and Jack Munro taking on Simone Jardim and her brother, Marcelo Jardim. This is the first time these two teams are facing off on the Championship Court. Don't miss the action!

programme.title: NPL
programme.desc: The Boca Raton Picklers face off against the Oklahoma City Punishers in a mixed team match.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA)
programme.desc: A high-level pickleball match from the 2025 NCPA Utah Regional as the Utah Tech collegiate program's top two teams battle head-to-head. Filmed live at Club Pickleball USA in Orem, Utah, this episode features the Women's Doubles showdown between the #2 seed Utah Tech 1, featuring Lauren Mercado and Ella Boydston, against the #3 seed Utah Tech 2, anchored by NCPA commentator Dillon Champigny and rising star Mary Monson. Experience the intense collegiate format, which includes singles, doubles, and mixed doubles, a design optimized based on direct player feedback.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023
programme.desc: Check out these US Open Pickleball Championship 2023 highlights!

programme.title: NPL
programme.desc: The NPL women face off as the Drivers take on the Bruisers.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2019
programme.desc: April 28, 2019 - May 4, 2019 at the East Naples Community Park in Naples, Florida

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2023
programme.desc: It's Bobbi Oshiro and Megan Fudge versus Mari Humberg and Martina Frantova in a Women's Pro Doubles match at the US Open Pickleball Championships 2023.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025
programme.desc: Experience the excitement of the Mixed Split Pro Age pickleball match on Championship Court. This video features a unique pairing of new partners Schull and Endara, who are familiar with the heat and come from a grinding three-game win in their last match. They face off against the formidable Lee Whitwell and Kafka. With Lee Whitwell's impressive hands and athleticism, and Kafka's hard-hitting forehand and topspin drives, this is a matchup you won't want to miss. Get ready for incredible rallies and a display of top-tier pickleball as these pros battle it out.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: The grand finale of the World Pickleball League Season 2 descends upon Mumbai’s Jio World Garden for an unforgettable clash of titans between the Chennai Super Champs and Delhi Dilwale. Witness the technical mastery of Rika Fujiwara as she faces off against Alejandra Lopez in a high-stakes women’s singles match that sets the tone for the entire championship. The intensity reaches a fever pitch during a mixed doubles "masterclass" featuring Max Mansoor and Trang Huynh, which commentators hailed as the potential "rally of the season". With the "Band of Honor" and the ultimate league trophy on the line, every strategic "Pickle Play" and nerve-wracking volley contributes to an atmosphere so electric the crowd and commentators alike are left "going berserk".

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024
programme.desc: In this thrilling gold medal match from the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, Dylan Frazier and Altaf Merchant take on defending champions Andrei Daescu and Dave Weinbach in the Men’s Split Pro Doubles division. The action heats up fast as Frazier and Merchant dominate early, only to be met with a fierce comeback from Daescu and Weinbach in game two. Momentum swings, net-cord drama, and tactical shifts lead to an electrifying third game where every point counts.From Frazier’s lightning-fast hands to Daescu’s towering net play, this match showcases elite shot-making, sharp strategy, and high emotion on Championship Court. With the crowd on edge and the gold medal on the line, it’s a true masterclass in professional pickleball.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball
programme.desc: October 30, 2023 - Welcome to week 6 - season 2 of The Arizona Pickleball League! It's Tuesday Night Pickleball @ The Orchard, and the Gilbert Gladiators face-off against the Tempe Tornadoes.

programme.title: DUPR Collegiate Pickleball Tour
programme.desc: The DUPR Collegiate National Championship concludes with a thrilling Women's Doubles showdown as the University of Virginia (UVA) takes on Utah Tech. Watch UVA's Alexander McDonald battle Utah Tech's Cammy Bliss and Avery Beck in a high-stakes, best-of-three match.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024
programme.desc: Molly Carter and Kim Kesner take on Diane Wainio and Karin Kochis in this Women's Senior Pro Backdraw Semifinal.

programme.title: The Wager
programme.desc: Jason Kennedy and Wes Burrows challenge Chandler Parsons and Jenna Bandy.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024
programme.desc: Dylan Frazier and James Johnson take on Andrei Daescu and Gabriel Tardio in this Men's Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match.

programme.title: National Collegiate Pickleball Association (NCPA)
programme.desc: Welcome to Championship Sunday at the NCPA Utah Regional 2025. This Round of 16 Collegiate Team Match pits the 5th-seeded Utah Tech against the 12th-seeded, but formidable, Utah State squad. The action takes place at Club Pickleball USA in Orem, Utah. Both teams are competing for a coveted bid to the National Championship in Saint Louis, Missouri, which features a $30,000 prize pool.

programme.title: NPL
programme.desc: The Naples JBB United face off against the Boca Raton Picklers in a Women's match.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2025
programme.desc: This championship game highlights the strategic play, including lobs and speed-ups, as both teams battle for the gold. A key dynamic of this match is that Courter and Carter had the advantage of playing under the shaded court conditions just before, while Dawson and Williams were coming from outside. Jen Dawson is noted as being a seasoned player on this court, having a triple crown in the Senior Pro divisions.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: Experience the electric atmosphere of the second "South Indian derby" in World Pickleball League Season 2 as the undefeated table-toppers, Chennai Super Champs, face off against the formidable Hyderabad Superstars. The drama unfolds at Mumbai's Jio World Garden with high-velocity matches, including a premier showdown between unbeaten singles stars Rika Fujiwara and Shawn Mendes. Every rally is a tactical masterclass, featuring the "beast from the East" Lee Hwang Nam in a high-stakes mixed doubles battle against Caitlin Hart and Louis Laville. From "sensational lobs" to the strategic intensity of men's singles, this tie showcases the pinnacle of professional pickleball as both teams fight for dominance on the leaderboard.

programme.title: Picklebowl 2023
programme.desc: In this action-packed Men’s Doubles match from Picklebowl 2023, Riley Newman and Josh Gartman face off against CJ Clinger and Tim Parks. These top pickleball players go head-to-head in a fast-paced, competitive match that features strategic plays, intense rallies, and plenty of drama. As the players represent their alma maters, the stakes are high as they battle for the Picklebowl trophy. Commentary by Drew Fieldhouse and Dave Fleming highlights the strategic nuances of the game while adding expert insights into each player’s performance. Watch these elite athletes showcase their skills in this thrilling charity event for the Wuerffel Foundation.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024
programme.desc: Dylan Frazier and Atlaf Merchant take on Kyle Yates and Dayne Gingrich in this Men's Split Pro Doubles.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: The World Pickleball League (WPBL) continues on Day 5 at the CCI Brabourne Stadium with a clash between Mumbai Pickle Power and the Chennai Super Champs.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024
programme.desc: Andrei Daescu and Gabriel Tardio take on Jack Munroand and Andre Mick in this Men's Pro Doubles Semifinal Match.

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024

programme.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball
programme.desc: March 28, 2023 - it's the Peoria Pythons and the Gilbert Gladiators in a battle for the best - live at The Orchard!

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: It's Super Sunday on Day 3 of the World Pickleball League (WPL) as Game Number Five pits the Chennai Super Champs against the Delhi team (Dilwale) at the CCI Brabourne Stadium in Mumbai. The stakes are incredibly high as teams battle for the final semi-final spots.The action starts with the First Mixed Doubles match, featuring Chennai's coach, the legendary pro Joey Farias, teaming up with Anna Clarice. They face the formidable duo of Delhi's Willie Chung and Lauren Mercado. The match is a tactical masterclass, with Willie Chung noted for his consistent, pro-level reset game and Farias praised for his on-court intelligence.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: It's the "Southern Derby" in the World Pickleball League (WPL) as Bengaluru takes on Chennai in the second tie of the day, live from the CCI Brabourne Stadium in Mumbai. The match features 48 players from six teams and 14 countries, with commentators detailing every crucial point.The tie begins with a thrilling Men's Singles match: Bengaluru's Blaskowitz (a Croatian talent) faces Chennai's Sobek (the Polish national champion). The commentators highlight the extreme patience and dinking skills demonstrated by both players, with Sobek's ability to keep the ball low being a key factor.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball
programme.desc: On March 14, 2023 - the Surprise Stingers and the Tempe Tornadoes go head-to-head - live at The Orchard!

programme.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024
programme.desc: Jorja Johnson faces off against Simone Jardim in this match-up of the Women's Pro Single Quarterfinal.

programme.title: European Pickleball Championship
programme.desc: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, hosts the Senior Women's Doubles Final under the floodlights . Team England, represented by Kirsty Gray and Anna Linton, faces off against Team Spain's Monica Ramirez and Araceli Senciales .After a strong start where England establishes an early lead, the match tightens as Spain finds their rhythm in the second game . Witness the strategic battle as Gray utilizes precision lobs to disrupt the Spanish defense , while Linton delivers powerful drives to secure critical points . In a high-stakes contest for the gold medal, England targets their opponents' positioning to close out the championship .

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: Experience the tactical intensity of the World Pickleball League as the Rajasthan Titans look to mount a comeback against the surging Hyderabad Superstars. This episode spotlights a generational clash in the men's singles match between Rajasthan’s Jack Foster and Hyderabad’s Marcelo Jardim, a 51-year-old former world No. 3 in padel and a true legend of racquet sports.

programme.title: Pickleball England
programme.desc: Catch the final showdown from the 2023 English Nationals as Mollie Kubrick-Finney and Thaddea Lock challenge reigning champs Antonella Giuliano and Pei Chun Kao. Featuring sharp angles, aggressive volleys, and expert analysis, this match crowns the best in British women’s doubles.

programme.title: World Pickleball League (WPBL)
programme.desc: It's Semi-Final Time on Day 9 of the World Pickleball League (WPBL)! This highly anticipated clash pits the Bengaluru Jawans, who finished top of the table (number one seed), against the Hyderabad Superstars, who narrowly snuck into the semi-finals (number four seed) after winning two matches the previous night. This is a classic 1 vs. 4 match-up, with the winner stamping their ticket to Championship Sunday.

programme.title: NPL
programme.desc: The National Pickleball League heats up as the Indianapolis Drivers take on the Austin Ignite in a coed team match packed with intensity, teamwork, and standout rallies. Representing two competitive NPL franchises, this mixed showdown brings high-level play, strategic depth, and crowd-fueled energy to the court. Whether you're cheering for the Drivers or backing the Ignite, this match is a showcase of what makes NPL team pickleball exciting to watch.

programme.title: Angler's Workshop | The Perfect Hair Jig Rod
programme.desc: Jim shows you how to build a hair jig rod, with detailed instruction from one of his Signature Series rod kits.

programme.title: Angling Buzz - Summer Midwest Fishing
programme.desc: It's late June and right now it's primetime for hot river fishing across the Upper Midwest for a variety of different reasons. Number one would be the low stable flows of the rivers, most of the rivers are also running fairly clear. Number two is it puts fish in fairly identifiable areas in the river thanks to the current. Today's guests is Captain Ben Wolfe of Sport Fish Michigan who targets a wide variety of fish throughout the river systems of Michigan.

programme.title: FishON | Biscotasing Lake
programme.desc: Fall fishing on Biscotasing Lake with some of our old buddies.

programme.title: FishON | More Lake Huron Walleye
programme.desc: More of Lake Huron Walleye Fishing

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing — The Ultimate Alaskan Fishing Charter
programme.desc: If you have never been to Alaska before, these next three episodes are an absolute must-see. The crew heads to Glacier Bay National Park, Alaska, to meet up with Alaskan Anglers Inn for an epic week of fishing. This fishing destination is unique in more ways than one. Not only does Shea McIntee and the rest of the crew get a chance to fish for the famous and bucket list fish, wild Alaskan Halibut, due to the glorious summer weather, they also get to see stunning wildlife in and out of the water.

programme.title: Catching Bass | Tiny Topwater Fun
programme.desc: Dustin fishes a finesse topwater bait for bass in Early Summer

programme.title: FishON! | Experience Fishing at Ole's Adventure Lodge
programme.desc: Join us as we travel to Ole's Adventure Lodge on the picturesque Whitefish Lake, just west of Thunder Bay, Ontario. In this special episode, we shine a spotlight on the Experience Fishing program, dedicated to introducing the joys of angling to children, new Canadians, and women. Witness the excitement of first-time fishing adventures in a breathtaking setting that inspires connection with nature and community.

programme.title: Larry Smith Outdoors
programme.desc: This week, Larry hits the Mississippi with Adam Christianson from Adrenaline Angling, looking for some monster Perch.

programme.title: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch

programme.desc: Jim reviews how to build your own bladed jig rod.

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing | 2.5-Day Party Boat Fishing Trip on the El Dorado
programme.desc: In today’s episode of Stoked on Fishing, we're aboard the 85ft El Dorado, experiencing the unpredictability of summertime fishing off the West Coast

programme.title: Hook n' Look — Chickamauga Chunks
programme.desc: Tennessee River fishing guide and bass tournament record holder, Rogne Brown joins host, Kim Stricker to share grass fishing tips and his developed sense of awareness while on the water. Strike King’s Sexy Dawg walking bait is the featured presentation.

programme.title: Hank Parker Fishing
programme.desc: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.

programme.desc: Dustin fishes brackish water for bass amd stipers

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing | A Fisherman's Paradise: Stoked on Puerto Rico
programme.desc: Join Stoked On Fishing as we embark on a thrilling 6-day fishing expedition to the enchanted Island of Puerto Rico. Nestled along the west coast, we'll be based in the charming fishing town of La Pargueta and fishing along the west coast locations of Cabo Rojo and Rincon. Get ready for an unforgettable adventure filled with wide-open offshore and inshore fishing. Stoked On Puerto Rico

programme.title: Larry Smith Outdoors | Detroit River Trolling
programme.desc: We're heading over to the Detroit river this week to hook up with our good friend Jason Julien from Church Tackle. We'll be teaching the in's and out's of using his excellent boards to catch some walleye!

programme.title: Angling Buzz - All About Swimbaits
programme.desc: This episode is all about Swimbaits, perhaps the most versatile tool in the tackle box for catching just about everything that swims.

programme.title: Angling Buzz - Easy Fishing Tactics
programme.desc: Fishing can be very high-tech, but on the other end of the spectrum, it can actually be very simple. Today we're going to show you some presentations and tactics to put fish in the boat....easily!

programme.title: Pro Vs Joe - South Florida Canals1

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing - Cedros Island Adventure
programme.desc: The next few episodes are special because the crew heads down to the famous Cedros Island fishing for giant Yellowtail, Dorado, and Calico Bass. This trip is nothing new to us; Shea McIntee and the crew have been fishing at Cedros Island for more than a decade and always stay at Cedros Outdoor Adventurers because of their excellent staff, beautiful resort, and fantastic fishing boats and captains.

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing - Epic Five Day Fishing Charter on the Top One 80, Part Two
programme.desc: Stoked On Fishing jumps on board the Top Gun 80 out of San Diego, California, for Stan Vanderburg's annual five-day Rod & Reel Radio charter. We go offshore and have an absolute blast. In part two, we run right into a Yellowfin Tuna school, and the boat goes bonkers.

programme.title: Spring Fishing Tips and Tricks

programme.desc: Hobie Outdoor Adventures flies down to the southernmost country of Central America, the Republic of Panama, and heads to a secluded coast with a lush rainforest coastline, where the only way to fish is from a kayak.

programme.title: Hobie Fishing — Austin, Texas Bass Fishing & the Hobie Pro Angler
programme.desc: Hobie Outdoor Adventures goes to Austin, Texas for some bass fishing and then to the BassMaster Classic for insight into the Hobie product line. And finally, we spend some time on the water with the Hobie Pro Angler.

programme.title: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
programme.desc: Paul and Perry kick off an adventurous journey down the Ivanhoe River, heading toward a lake that’s known to deliver steady walleye action. But this time, the fish had other plans. With walleye proving tough to track down, the duo turns to the river’s reliable residents—Northern Pike—to keep the rods bending and the spirits high. Surrounded by stunning scenery, flowing rapids, and beautiful waterfalls, this river run becomes more than just a fishing trip—it’s a reminder that the North’s wild beauty always makes the day worthwhile, no matter what’s biting.

programme.title: FishON! | "Trophy Walleye Adventure on Pierre Lake"
programme.desc: Join us as we kick off Season 7 with an unforgettable adventure north of Cochrane, Ontario, on the pristine waters of Pierre Lake. We team up with Mark Froud from Dunn Right Outfitters, an expert in Northern Ontario fishing, to target trophy walleye. Experience the thrill of reeling in massive catches while surrounded by breathtaking wilderness, and gain valuable tips and insights from Mark to enhance your own fishing techniques. This episode sets the tone for a season filled with excitement, exploration, and exceptional angling.

programme.title: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
programme.desc: As fall grips Northern Ontario, unpredictable weather makes fishing a true test of patience and perseverance. Paul is joined by young angler Matthew, who’s finishing university and weighing the decision to stay in the North. Facing extreme cold on their first attempt, the duo regroup and return a few days later to a new lake, chasing walleye and capturing the stunning wilderness that makes Northern Ontario a fall angler’s paradise.

programme.title: FishON! | Trailblazing to Trophy Walleye: Polaris Ranger Adventure
programme.desc: Join the FishON! TV crew as we tackle rugged Northern Ontario terrain with our Polaris Ranger equipped with a custom boat rack. This remote expedition takes us deep into the wilderness to an untouched lake known for its walleye bounty. From the adrenaline of the journey to the thrill of the catch, this episode is packed with adventure, stunning scenery, and fishing tips you won’t want to miss!

programme.title: FishON! | Remote Escapes: Pike Frenzy and Hidden Lake Explorations
programme.desc: In the thrilling Season 7 finale, Paul & Perry and the team venture deep into Northern Ontario, using a Polaris Ranger to access a remote lake with high hopes for walleye. However, the day takes a surprising turn as Northern Pike steal the show with their spirited action. The adventure doesn’t end there—a bonus portage into another lake offers a chance to explore uncharted waters. It’s a fitting conclusion to a season filled with the unexpected and unforgettable.

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing - An Unforgettable Trip, South Lake, Part Two
programme.desc: This show was filmed in late October of 2019. Four months prior, in June of 2019, Tim Carnahan was diagnosed with Glioblastoma, Brain Cancer. According to Tim's medical team, his life expectancy could be between three months and 18 months. Fast forward to now, 2020; today's update is one we hoped would never come. With a heavy heart and tear-filled eyes, we share with you that Tim Carnahan has passed away after battling for close to 12 months. It only fits that the last words to pass his lips were I love you, Lory, and keep fishing. While his time on earth was cut short, the amount of joy he experienced and shared with others was genuinely tremendous and will never be forgotten. If you would like to help out in any way, lory and friends have put together a Go Fund Me page to ease the financial burden of medical bills and afford lory some time to greave and transition into life without Tim. We love you, Tim. Rest in peace, buddy.

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing - We Love Fishing the High Sierras, Part Two
programme.desc: The Sierra Nevada mountain range in California is home to many lakes with excellent trout fishing. Thanks to Shea's father, Patt McIntee, June Lake has been a favorite for decades. We spend some time fishing both June Lake and Lake Crowley. Then later, we fish a lake that is brand new to us.

programme.title: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
programme.desc: Paul and Ray return to a remote Northern Ontario lake for the final shoot of the season. Facing a tricky beaver dam crossing, they bring in Dan and Ben for extra hands and safety. The day delivers incredible walleye and bass action, capped off with a shore lunch featuring perfectly seasoned walleye courtesy of Outdoor Flavours.

programme.title: FishON! | Storm’s Edge Success: Fishing Frederick House Lake
programme.desc: Join us as we head to Frederick House Lake in Connaught, Ontario, just east of Timmins. With a narrow window of opportunity before the weather closes in, we reel in some fantastic walleye, sauger, and other exciting species. It's all about adapting to the elements and making the most of the moment!

programme.desc: GLORY 78 SFS features TWO title fights. Wisse takes on Belgaroui for the Middleweight crown while Beztati fights Gashi for the rights at Lightweight. Also, a battle at lightweight featuring two top opponants.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: GLORY 78 is headlined by kickboxing legend Badr Hari (106-15-0, 92 KO, Morocco), who will take rising heavyweight contender Arkadiusz Wrzosek (12-5-0, 7 KO, Poland) in the main event. Alex Pereira (33-6-0, 21 KO, Brazil) will defend the light heavyweight title against Artem Vakhitov (21-6-0, 8 KO, Russia).

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: 6 Champions, 3 Title Fights, 1 Special Night. The main event features a four man heavyweight tournament including Glory heavyweight champion Rico Verhoeven, as well as Hesdy Gerges, Levi Rigters and Tarik Khbabez.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: Badr Hari battles Benjamin Adegbuyi in a heavyweight contender fight plus the long-awaited rubber match title fight between Cédric Doumbé and Murthel Groenhart. programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: Brazilian GLORY middleweight champion Alex ‘Po Atan’ Pereira (31-6, 20 KO’s) headlines the GLORY 74 ARNHEM section of the card, putting his title on the line against Ertugul Bayrak (18-6, 5 KO’s) in a main event fight set for five rounds.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: COLLISION 2 is headlined by GLORY world heavyweight champion Rico ‘The King of Kickboxing’ Verhoeven (55-10, 16 KO’s) and his arch-rival Badr Hari (106-13,92 KO’s), rematching three years on from their first epic encounter.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: World featherweight champion Petchpanomrung (163-36-3, 27 KO’s) headlines the card, traveling from Bangkok, Thailand to defend his title belt against former champion Serhii Adamchuk (40-11, 15 KO’s), from Ukraine but fighting out of Mike’s Gym in Amsterdam.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: California’s Tiffany ‘Time Bomb’ Van Soest 20-4-1 (6 KO’s) seeks to snatch the super-bantamweight title from the seemingly-unbeatable Anissa Meksen (99-4, 32 KO’s) of Paris, France.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: This event featured the number one contender fight between Alim Nabiev and the former Glory Welterweight Champion Cedric Doumbe as Superfight Series headliner.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: The event featured the long-awaited rematch between former champion Badr Hari and Hesdy Gerges as Glory 51 headliner. This event also featured a 4-Man Welterweight Contender Tournament to earn a shot at the Glory Welterweight Championship.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: GLORY Kickboxing’s Summer of GLORY concluded with a massive event from the Johan Cruijff Arena in Amsterdam. In the night’s headliner, heavyweight champion Rico Verhoeven took on Brazilian challenger Guto Inocente. Verhoeven had defended his belt seven straight times since capturing the title in 2014. His winning streak inside the GLORY ring stood at 16. Inocente looked to dethrone the world’s top-ranked heavyweight riding the momentum of wins over Benjamin Adegbuyi, D’Angelo Marshall and Hesdy Gerges. Gold was also on the line in the co-main event, as longtime featherweight titleholder Robin van Roosmalen rematched interim champion Petchpanomrung Kiatmookao. The pair met previously at GLORY 41 — also in van Roosmalen’s home country of Holland — with the Dutchman taking home a controversial, majority-decision victory.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: GLORY is bringing out the heavy hitters for their final show of 2018, as an eight-man heavyweight tournament has been set for Rotterdam. Headlined by former heavyweight contender tournament winner Benjamin Adegbuyi and Jamal Ben Saddik as the top two seed, the winner will go on to win $100,000 for making it through the eight-man, three-round affair.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: A stacked SUPERFIGHT SERIES card is headlined by former welterweight champion Murthel ‘The Predator’ Groenhart (68-23-3, 39 KO’s) and rising threat Alim Nabiyev (50-7, 21 KO’s). The winner will forcefully insert his name into the title shot conversation.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: Two world title fights headline GLORY 64 STRASBOURG on Saturday, March 9 as GLORY makes its first visit to the historic French city.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: This event featured the number one contender fight between Alim Nabiev and the former Glory Welterweight Champion Cedric Doumbe as Superfight Series headliner.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: The event featured the long-awaited rematch between former champion Badr Hari and Hesdy Gerges as Glory 51 headliner. This event also featured a 4-Man Welterweight Contender Tournament to earn a shot at the Glory Welterweight Championship.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing

In the night’s headliner, heavyweight champion Rico Verhoeven took on Brazilian challenger Guto Inocente. Verhoeven had defended his belt seven straight times since capturing the title in 2014. His winning streak inside the GLORY ring stood at 16. Inocente looked to dethrone the world’s top-ranked heavyweight riding the momentum of wins over Benjamin Adegbuyi, D’Angelo Marshall and Hesdy Gerges. Gold was also on the line in the co-main event, as longtime featherweight titleholder Robin van Roosmalen rematched interim champion Petchpanomrung Kiatmookao. The pair met previously at GLORY 41 — also in van Roosmalen’s home country of Holland — with the Dutchman taking home a controversial, majority-decision victory.

programme.desc: Tony helps an owner move a custom Mercury to none other than Joe Zolper as a potential buyer. Then, a lead sends Tony to a dusty garage hiding a nearly untouched Porsche RS America with just 5,000 original miles.

programme.title: Lost Classics
programme.desc: Tony teams up with the Auto Archeologist, Ryan Brutt, to uncover one of the rarest Dodge Demons in existence. Then Tony follows the trail to make an offer on a movie-star, an Eleanor Mustang. With this deal, the sky's the limit!

programme.title: Lost Classics
programme.desc: Tony digs out a rare Mustang that's been hidden under dusty boxes for decades, but the owner has another surprise in store. Then Tony gets a chance to size up a Model A truck at an auction preview before he heads to the famous Spring Carlisle.

programme.title: Lost Classics
programme.desc: A Hurst Oldsmobile emerges from years in storage and roars back to life in the shop.

programme.title: Lost Classics
programme.desc: Tony helps prep a quirky, rare British TVR for sale and makes a play for one of the most elusive Camaros ever built, the legendary ZL1. When Tony is offered a rust-free '55 Chevy he knows it's too good of a deal to pass up.

programme.title: Centered: Joe Lieberman
programme.desc: Joe Lieberman almost became the first Jewish vice president of the United States. Known for putting principles above party, his message of moderation and bipartisanship resonates even more powerfully today.

programme.title: Beyond Watergate: The Richard Nixon Story
programme.desc: Explore the enigmatic life of Richard Nixon, from his rise to power as the 37th U.S. president to the infamous Watergate scandal.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon
programme.desc: During the four decades of the Cold War, two global superpowers face off, poised for swift and terrible action, threatening to annihilate one another, with the push of a button.

programme.title: Nazis on the Run
programme.desc: 24 Nazi officials enter the courtroom at Nuremberg, Germany. The biggest trial in history is about to begin. Broadcast around the world, the public awaits justice.

programme.title: Cost of War
programme.desc: The Afghan War lasted 14 years from 2001 to 2014 at an estimated cost of $1.07 trillion. The human cost has been significant - 2,350 U.S. troops died and 20,092 suffered injuries.

programme.title: Upheaval: The Journey of Menachem Begin
programme.desc: The life of Israeli Prime Minister Menachem Begin, a proud and scarred leader haunted by the Holocaust and war who was able to make peace with his greatest enemy.

programme.title: Coolidge: Rediscovering an American President
programme.desc: Calvin Coolidge - the man Ronald Reagan called "one of our most underrated presidents." Coolidge led America through an era of booming prosperity, slashed taxes and debt.

programme.title: The Fifth Estate
programme.desc: The top-notch team of hosts Bob McKeown, Gillian Findlay, Mark Kelley and Habiba Nosheen provides unique and engaging documentaries from Canada and beyond. "The Fifth Estate" is a reference to the term Fourth Estate, and was chosen to highlight the program's determination to go beyond everyday news into original journalism. The series has won numerous awards for its reporting, including Gemini Awards, International Emmys, the Michener Award, and even an Academy Award for a 1981 episode that was released in theaters the following year. Since September 1975, Canadians have tuned in to experience interesting stories that are always well-crafted and thought-provoking.

programme.title: The Fifth Estate

programme.title: Marketplace
programme.desc: Canada's consumer watchdog series since 1972, this news program uncovers wrongdoings in the marketplace. With the help of hidden cameras, correspondents dish out the dirt on not so "clean" business practices. Once they get the evidence they need on tape, they apply pressure on businesses to change policies vis-a-vis the products and services they provide to the public.

programme.desc: Stadium Championship Series East rolls into upstate New York as Tyler Menninga attempts to clinch his second straight series title, while JCB Digatron’s Tristan England and Megalodon’s Todd LeDuc attempt to block Grave Digger from the series win.

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.desc: Monster Jam rocks the crowd at NRG Stadium in Houston, Texas.

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.desc: The Monster Jam 2021 Stadium Championship Series continues at Atlanta Motor Speedway in Georgia.

programme.title: Championship Series
programme.desc: The Great Clip’s Mohawk Warrior’s Bryce Kenny goes for his second event championship of the season. While Adam Anderson looks for another dominant win and complete control of the series points lead. Find out who ends up on top as Stadium Championship Series Red roars into Lincoln Finanical Field.

programme.title: Full Strut
programme.desc: Mike had a little bit of a struggle to kickoff his 2024 Missouri Spring Turkey season. The birds seemed to be in a bit a of funky stage and wouldn't fully commit until later on in the season. After multiple failed attempts Mike finally finds a lonely gobbler in the right mood!

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.desc: On this episode of Hunting Land Man, Slade, Ryan and Bearcub take on the midwest! After some tough hunting, the group is able to make a move to get in position on a BIG midwestern gobbler! Bearcub was able to harvest him after working the bird for almost 45 minutes! Slade and Ryan also do some Pre-Deer season work, and establish where the fall food-plots will be!

programme.title: hunting_land_man
programme.desc: It’s Caleb’s turn to hunt and Slade gets behind the camera. They encounter their target buck, but end up getting a shot at a different buck, and it’s a big boy.

programme.title: Shoshone Adventures
programme.desc: Join Shoshone's own David McElwain and Crew as they embarks on an exceptional safari hunt pursing Kudu, Impala, Springbok, and more in this week’s film. Hunting alongside premier outfitter, Western Safaris, enjoy this engaging film following these hunters on their exceptional Eastern Cape Hunting Expedition.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: In this episode Andy and his friend Scotty take on Kodiak Island, Alaska for an adventure of Salmon fishing and hunting black tail deer. Whilst traversing steep mountains in the company of Kodiak brown bears and taking on cold Alaskan waters, Andy presents useful information for fellow outdoor enthusiasts all whilst building friendships with the great people of Kodiak Big Timber Lodge.

programme.title: Wildbound by Forloh
programme.desc: In this episode Andy goes back to his home farm in Alabama for deer and quail hunting. Not only does he make incredible dishes with his former ‘masterchef’ contestant Alex which he serves to local children in need but he explains how hunting is never about “just the hunt” but about the camaraderie, friendship and memories made through the pursuit of the harvest.

programme.title: Turkey Posse
programme.desc: Hunting Wisconsin gobblers into the final weeks of May comes with its challenges. Birds have faced a full season of hunting pressure, and they’re always a moment away from flipping the switch into summer patterns. But those last few eager longbeards make it worth the grind. In this episode of the Turkey POSSE, Grant Hudgens tags his first ever out-of-state strutter and becomes a card-carrying member of the Turkey POSSE.

programme.title: Turkey Posse
programme.desc: Turkey hunting in Texas hits differently — especially when it’s your first time behind the gun. In this week’s HuntStand TURKEY POSSE episode, Will Cooper introduces longtime best friends Aubry Gold and Chance Eckert to the world of spring turkey hunting in the Lone Star State. What starts as a casual hunt quickly turns into full-blown addiction as Rio Grande gobblers fire up, decoys get worked, and the Texas cedars come alive.

programme.title: The WoodHaven Way
programme.desc: David Lindsey’s 2024 Iowa season was anything but ordinary. He set his sights on one of the greatest bucks ever to roam The Lindsey Way farm — a deer he called “Pretty Boy.” From close calls to wild twists, David’s pursuit was full of highs, lows, and more excitement than any hunt in recent memory. But somewhere in the chaos, another story unfolded — a tough old buck that survived EHD and became just a little too predictable. David seized the opportunity, made the shot, and finally got some blood under his belt for the season.

programme.title: Pure Hunting
programme.desc: Willi and Tom Petry drew the late season muzzleloader tag for Iowa after an invitation from Tom’s friends, Cody and Cassie. Willi had never hunted Iowa for deer and not wanting to wait for 4-5 years for an archery tag, he took advantage of the offer. It can be a great time to shoot a big buck with the deer focusing on food, but the weather needs to be right.

programme.title: Pure Hunting
programme.desc: Willi and Chris are back in New Mexico, bowhunting elk. Willi made a poor shot on a bull, and after discovering the cause of the poor shot, he hopes to get redemption as their hunting days come to a close.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: A remnant of the last Ice Age, the musk ox is almost mythical in appearance. For the people who share the Barren Ground region of Canada with them, they are an integral part of their culture. Show host, Dan Cabela, participates in a scientific sampling project to monitor the - population's health, and get first-hand experience of the relationship between local people and this arctic icon.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Rusty Creasey joins the Spring Thunder crew for an incredible turkey hunt in Oklahoma. The guys are blessed to fill 6 tags in a short time and have several memorable hunts.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Michael Pitts of Realtree Road Trips joins Anthony Virga and Matt Garger hunting the hills of New York.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Justin and Brandi with Big Dreams Outdoors finish up their slam hunting Merriam turkeys with 7J Outfitters in Wyoming. It was a tough week for Justin but persistence pays off!

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Michael Pitts and Anthony Virga join Realtree Spring Thunder producer Matt Garger to turkey hunt on his home turf in New York's Adirondack Mountains.

programme.title: Spring Thunder
programme.desc: Roger Culpepper takes Sophia Mahlke and her dad Tom to kill her first longbeard. The guys and girl find the gobblers on roost in a beautiful Georgia hardwood bottom and make their move.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: The boys are still at the Raven in Missouri trying to finish planting 50 acres of Big Tine food plots in 5 days. Then Randy heads to the Powder River in Montana and tries to knock down his first buck of the 2025 season.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: It’s still opening week of bow season in Oklahoma and the crew has three tags left to fill.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: The crew is all at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma kicking of the 2024 Rifle season.

programme.title: The Raven Project
programme.desc: Bow season is finally here and the boys are at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma. Randy is chasing a buck he named "The Camp Buck" because of how close the buck is to camp. If Randy can get it done this will be his biggest buck to date in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Florida Keys guide Jeff Malone to find a productive wreck with which they enjoy the exciting variety of fish that wrecks can provide.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by marine scientist Nick Castillo to search for bonefish in Key Largo for both fun and study.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor take a trip to the Marathon, FL area to challenge some feisty sharks and sneaky snook.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by young guide Richard Black as he leads them to a backcountry slam.

programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Key West guide Nick LaBadie, a talented guide with a special knack for finding permit on the Key West flats.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by New York Cop Mike Counihan, who brings his passion for fitness and fishing along as the crew take on sharks in the Middle Florida Keys flats.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Mike highlights some of the best fishing destinations throughout St. Pete and Clearwater.

programme.title: Goin' Coastal
programme.desc: Josh heads offshore for the first day of red snapper season with his friend Joe Koenraad.

programme.title: Fox Hollow Outdoors
programme.desc: Larken and Michael set out on a Florida Man adventure in part 1 of this 2 part series. Join them in the Florida keys and Everglades for an experience that few get to experience.

programme.title: Fox Hollow Outdoors
programme.desc: On this episode of Fox Hollow Outdoors, Michael and Larken end their trip to Florida with an epic day of offshore fishing with Captain Chris Trosset.

programme.title: Silver Kings
programme.desc: Capt. Jared Raskob and Capt. Mike Alfano have a big surprise for Mike’s Dad, Randy.

programme.title: Local Lines
programme.desc: Brandon meets up with his buddy Dave for some crystal river bank beating. Throwing top water lures on the nature coast? It doesn’t get much better than this!

programme.title: Flats Class
programme.desc: In this episode of Flats Class, CA travels to South Carolina to fish for redfish with Captain Brian Vaughn, the Tide Master.

programme.title: Captain's Log
programme.desc: With only a limited amount of time, Capt. Jonathan Moss is in Pine Island Sound, on the hunt for monster migratory Tarpon.

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc: PCB Fishing report author Nathan Chennaux joins Capt. Justin - scanning the beach waters for tarpon and hooks into a monster while maneuvering around storms and vacationers. Does it get to the boat?

programme.title: Chasin' The Sun
programme.desc: Joined by PCB’s Artificial Reef Coordinator Erin Graham Capt Justin - fish previously dropped reefs before sinking the famed BLACK PEARL from iconic films right off Panama City Beach, FL.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Join us for an unforgettable Women Go Hunting experience at Legends Ranch in Michigan!

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Craig Harrison and Rusty Smith from Caza Outdoors (Los Cazadores, Pnuma, - Trophy Scan, Heated Core & more) hunt with the TTHA crew at the G2 Ranch in Pearsall, TX. Sharing a deer camp with friends is a time honored tradition across the country, and one that we hold near and dear to our hearts here at Texas Trophy Hunters!

programme.title: Deer and Deer Hunting
programme.desc: Explore the dominance hierarchy that emerges as bucks compete for - breeding rights. Then, watch Mark Kayser hunt Kansas where he sets his sights on a massive whitetail buck.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: It’s been 60 years since AA was introduced to the shooting sports world. Since that day, an immeasurable number of AA hulls have hit the ground and countless shooters have stood center stage raising a trophy where millions of dollars have been won. Professional and recreational shooters alike have trusted AA for six decades. In this episode, load up for stories of high school, collegiate competitors and the world’s best as they bust clays with the legendary shot shell. - GUESTS: Zach Keenbaum (Team Winchester) Desi Edmunds (Team Winchester) Kayla Wilgus (Team Winchester) Amy Cawley (Team Winchester) Anthony Matarese (Team Winchester)

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: South Africa offers an incredible insight into the hunter and gatherer history of ancestors. Dan Cabela re-traces the footsteps of humanity's forefathers and explores how modern, private ownership of land has helped re-balance the human relationship with nature.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Florida Keys guide Jeff Malone to find a productive wreck with which they enjoy the exciting variety of fish that wrecks can provide.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by marine scientist Nick Castillo to search for bonefish in Key Largo for both fun and study.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor take a trip to the Marathon, FL area to challenge some feisty sharks and sneaky snook.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by young guide Richard Black as he leads them to a backcountry slam.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Key West guide Nick LaBadie, a talented guide with a special knack for finding permit on the Key West flats.

programme.title: Blair Wiggins Outdoor
programme.desc: A look back at the favorites of Season 3.

programme.title: We Caught That
programme.desc: Capt. Jason Dozier teams up with Capt. David Paycheck for a day of firsts. Jason tries a new style of bass fishing with David, and then introduces David to hunting Moorhen for the first time.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: Join Rush and his good friend Anthony Solmo for an epic day of fishing in the stunning waters of Key West, Florida! Leaving the Odyssea at the dock, they hop on a bay boat outfitted with a trolling motor for the ultimate inshore adventure. Gliding quietly through the shallows, they target a variety of species—including hard-pulling Tarpon and explosive topwater Jacks—leaving Rush thinking, “A guy could get used to this kind of fishing!”

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: SoCal summer is calling, and the Local Knowledge crew is back on Ali’s home turf in San Diego, California. With reports of hot bites and fish moving in, the crew faces a classic Southern California dilemma — chase big yellowtail around the Coronado Islands or head north in search of bluefin tuna. The options are plenty, the challenges are real, and that’s exactly what keeps fishing in SoCal so exciting.

programme.title: Super Retriever
programme.desc: The Amateur Division reaches its climax at the Super Retriever Series Crown Championship. Top teams battle through the final rounds of Retriever Trials, where every point matters. In the end, one standout handler and dog team rises above the rest to be crowned Amateur SRS Crown Champions. At the same time, the excitement continues on the dock as fun-loving canine athletes compete for their own Crown victories in SRS Super Dock.

programme.title: Into The Blue
programme.desc: Captains Scott Walker and Steve Rodger continue fishing after taking a long run out into the Gulf from Key West to sample the bottom fishing and the long range capability of their new Invincible Catamaran.

programme.title: Into The Blue
programme.desc: Captains Scott Walker and Steve Rodger fish out of Key West for tunas and sailfish while battling big seas and big sharks.

programme.desc: Live Coverage of Carolina Chaos vs Philadelphia Waterdogs
