programme.desc: Cannons vs Whipsnakes from August 26, 2023

programme.title: Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show
programme.desc: Welcome to Episode 14 (Season 3) of the Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show presented by Duke Cannon. For this episode, we traveled to Charlottesville to party with the Princeton Tigers after their National Championship win. Then, Mitch and the crew broke down everything we saw at Championship Weekend, made our final Tewaaraton Award predictions, and looked ahead to PLL and WLL action in Baltimore this weekend.

programme.title: University of Texas Documentary
programme.desc: 3 years ago, pro lacrosse player Kyle Hartzell stepped on the campus of University of Texas at Austin as their new club lacrosse team head coach. Now they are a top MCLA program competing for championships. TLN went to Austin, TX during the most anticipated game of the Longhorn's season to uncover what makes their program so special.

programme.title: Going West
programme.desc: University of Utah turns club lacrosse into NCAA lacrosse team

programme.title: TLN Facility Tours
programme.desc: Johns Hopkins & Clemson: Explore two top-tier lacrosse programs as TLN takes you inside their world-class facilities. Visit Johns Hopkins in Baltimore, MD, home to the legendary Blue Jays, and tour the iconic Cordish Lacrosse Center and Homewood Field. Then, head to Clemson, SC, for an exclusive look at the nation's premier women's lacrosse facilities.

programme.title: Through X
programme.desc: Joey Spallina - Paul Carcaterra visits Syracuse, N.Y. to pull back the curtain on the biggest name in College Lacrosse: Joey Spallina. In this episode of THROUGH X, Spallina speaks on wearing the No. 22 at Syracuse, shares his goal to return the Orange to NCAA Championship glory, and shows you how to score his signature behind-the-back goal.

programme.title: Through X
programme.desc: Paul Carcaterra heads to Evanston, IL to visit with Northwestern's Izzy Scane. Izzy has been a dominant force for the Wildcats since she first arrived on campus. With a National title, the Tewaaraton Award winner, and record shattering season – she has cemented herself as an all-time great. We also went to Charlottesville, VA to dissect the elite game of Connor Shellenberger: a hometown hero, and arguably the best player in history for the University of Virginia.

programme.title: Connor Shellenberger | 2025 Season Highlights
programme.desc: The New York Atlas attackman had a historic sophomore season including the Jim Brown MVP Award and a Championship.

programme.title: Marcus Holman and the Moment He Became Obsessed with Lacrosse
programme.desc: Kyle Harrison sits down with Marcus Holman - one of lacrosse’s greatest shooters and leaders - for an honest conversation about family, obsession, adversity, longevity, and chasing the all-time goals record. Marcus takes us back to his earliest memories from John's Hopkins’ locker room to the moment he fell in love with shooting He opens up about evolving his role, becoming a leader, sustaining greatness into his mid-30s, and what it would mean to cement his legacy in the record books.

programme.title: The BEST Moments From Street Lacrosse in Atlanta
programme.desc: We compiled the best moments from our Atlanta Street Lacrosse livestream. Check out these highlights from the HBCU game, MCLA game, Atlanta All-Stars, and PLL/WLL pros — as well as interviews with EarthGang and others!

programme.title: Brennan O'Neill | 2025 Season Highlights
programme.desc: See the best of Brennan O'Neil in his highlights from the 2025 season.

programme.title: Trevor Baptiste: Pressure, Expectations, and What Comes Next
programme.desc: Kyle Harrison sits down with Trevor Baptiste - the most dominant faceoff athlete of his generation - for an honest conversation about mentality, evolution, pressure, and the moments that shaped his journey to becoming an all-time great. From a chance clinic in eighth grade to a national championship as a freshman, Baptiste opens up about staying even-keeled, proving himself year after year, and why he still believes his best lacrosse is ahead of him.

programme.title: Brennan O’Neill Opens Up About Becoming ‘The Guy’
programme.desc: Kyle Harrison sits down with Brennan O’Neill - one of the most hyped lacrosse players of the modern era - for an unfiltered conversation about pressure, expectations, development, and learning to love the game for the right reasons.

programme.title: The Son of Zorro
programme.desc: In imperial Mexico, Don Ricardo Villaverde leads a double life as the masked Son of Zorro, defending the oppressed from the cruel Governor Leblanche. When rebels ambush a weapons convoy and kill Don Herrera, his daughter Conchita is saved by Zorro, sparking a daring fight against tyranny.

programme.title: Beyond Hatred
programme.desc: After a childhood massacre, a girl is captured by Indians and grows up among them. Years later, during renewed hostilities, she recognizes a wounded captive as her long-lost brother, forcing both sides into a brutal conflict while past and present collide on the frontier.

programme.title: Patience Has a Limit, We Don't
programme.desc: During the Civil War, Corporal MacDonald hides a large gold shipment meant for the Union. Before he can retrieve it, he's killed—taking the secret location with him. Now, a Union lieutenant and MacDonald's two sons compete to uncover the buried treasure in a tense hunt filled with danger and deception.

programme.title: Troublemakers
programme.desc: Two brothers who hate each other are going to spend Christmas with their mother. She tries to get them together.

programme.title: Twenty Paces to Death
programme.desc: A young half-breed is saved from death and raised as a son by his rescuer. Years later, love and betrayal tear the family apart when he falls for his adoptive sister, while a vengeful woman plots the downfall of the man who once saved them both.

programme.title: His Name was King
programme.desc: A relentless bounty hunter pursues a brutal gang of gunrunners deep into Mexico. As he crosses the lawless borderlands, he’s drawn into a deadly chase where justice and vengeance blur in the desert heat.

programme.title: Pistol for a Hundred Coffins
programme.desc: A Civil War veteran swears revenge when he returns home to find his family killed by a local gang.

programme.title: Cry Blood Apache
programme.desc: Gang of sadistic cowboys let nothing stand in their way in their search for gold.

programme.title: And God Said to Cain
programme.desc: After ten years in prison for a crime he didn’t commit, ex-Confederate officer Gary Hamilton returns to seek revenge on Acombar, the man who framed him and stole both his gold and his lover. Surrounded by enemies, Hamilton uses the town’s secret tunnels to strike back in a stormy, haunting showdown.

programme.title: Murieta!
programme.desc: The story of Joaquin Murrieta, a real life Mexican bandit who terrorized California with his gang of raiders and cutthroats during the first half of the 19th century. Some saw him as a murderous outlaw, others as the Mexican Robin Hood.

programme.title: There's a Noose Waiting for You Trinity!
programme.desc: Trinity is an ex-gunslinger desperately wanting to be forgiven and accepted by his family that he abandoned years earlier. Unfortunately for him, a ruthless bounty hunter is on his trail.

programme.title: You're Jinxed, Friend You've Met Sacramento
programme.desc: This fast-moving tale revolves around the kidnaping of a boxer's daughter. The boxer pays the ransom money but the girl is still not released. Her boyfriend decides to get her back his own way, killing her ruthless captor in a fierce duel.

programme.title: Two Crosses at Danger Pass
programme.desc: Judy and Alex are the only two survivors of a punitive mission ordered by the rich and ruthless Moran.... The girl becomes his maid and the boy is adopted by a Quaker family. Alex, despite the philosophy of forgiveness he has been taught, plans to take revenge.

programme.title: One Dollar Too Many
programme.desc: Suave gambler Clay Watson, cocky sharpshooter Moses Lang, and wily thespian Edwin Kean are a trio of criminals in the Old West.

programme.title: Savage Pampas
programme.desc: In the late 1800's, an army captain tries to tame the open plains of Argentina which are dominated by Indians and bandits. To help do this, the captain brings in a party of women to keep his soldiers happy.

programme.title: The Commish
programme.desc: Tony helps a distraught father locate the son he lost to a witness relocation program.

programme.title: The Commish
programme.desc: An seemingly accidental death exposes a neighbor's bigamy; David resorts to theft to impress some friends.

programme.title: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
programme.desc: Rick Hunter's back. He's considering marrying his girlfriend. But before he could, she is murdered.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: A dispatcher is blackmailed into undermining Hunter's and McCall's investigation of a gold robbery.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall track a pair of killers through LA where a crime wave threatens to tear the community apart.

programme.desc: Hunter and McCall investigate the death of a multi-millionaire, whose four heirs become prime suspects.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: The only clue in a series of murders leads Hunter and McCall to suspect a colleague as the killer.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: The case of a teenager who mistakenly shot his parents during what he claimed was a home invasion.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall find the murdered body of a call girl, and a toddler left unharmed in front of her tv set.

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall investigate the suicide of Hunter's friend from the Vietnam War, uncovering an old betrayal.

programme.title: The Commish
programme.desc: Although Tony's new baby daughter, Sarah, is giving him many a sleepless night, he is nevertheless determined to outwit a serial rapist.

programme.title: The Commish
programme.desc: A notorious New York rackateer relocates to Eastbridge during the holiday season. Tony now has to be more concerned with peace on his own turf.

programme.title: The Commish
programme.desc: After Tony's expensive new automobile is stolen from him at gunpoint, he and Cyd clash over the best way to capture Eastbridge's busiest carjackers.

programme.title: The Commish
programme.desc: Tony joins a video-dating service when he suspects one of his clients is a murderous thief. Also, Stan tries to protect Carmela from a calirvoyant's curse.

programme.title: The Commish
programme.desc: Commissioner Scali and his team of officers pull out all stops as they try to beat the clock in a desperate search for the kidnapper of a very sick baby.

programme.title: The Commish
programme.desc: Tony suspects foul play when a member of a commando-like squad of elite prep-school students -- perpetrators of a series of break-in thefts -- disappears.

programme.title: The Commish
programme.desc: When Nick Colette, the hot-headed son of a "retired" mobster Tommy Colette, joins forces with his father, Eastbridge's crime troubles start.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: When Reno attempts to bust his latest bounty at a railway station, the man slips from his grasp and the station, but not before stealing a car and killing the owner.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: When Reno attempts to bust an athletic beachcomber wanted for the armed robbery of a police van, he is blind sided by a female bounty hunter

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: Armed robber Andy DuPree, has managed to allude authorities across the country and has once again returned to his hometown for his next round of scores.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: When a beautiful, young Mafia wife is framed for the murder of her husband, she fears for her life, knowing that his mob boss father will stop at nothing to revenge his son's death.

programme.title: Renegade
programme.desc: When Reno tracks down assault and battery suspect Jason Calhoun, the head of a gang of surfers, he is immediately enthralled by the young man's charisma but soon thereafter uncovers evidence of Calhoun's involvement in a much larger operation

programme.title: Love at the Christmas Table
programme.desc: Family friends Sam and Kat spend every Christmas Eve at the Children's Table. They grow up together, sharing the highs and lows of young adulthood. And at thirty, Sam realizes that Kat is the one... but he's afraid that the past will get in the way.

programme.title: The Challenge of the Lady Ninja
programme.desc: During the Japanese occupation of Shanghai, a Chinese woman trains in the covert arts. When she arrives in Hong Kong, she learns that her brother works on behalf the Japanese cause. She then pulls together a team of women warriors to stop her brother

programme.title: Dark Space
programme.desc: When their shuttle is damaged on the way to Centari Five, six friends are forced to crash land on the surface of a mysterious alien planet. Stranded with little hope of rescue, it soon becomes clear that they are not alone. Hunted by the planet's ferociou

programme.title: The Avenging Eagle
programme.desc: Eagle Chief Yoh Xi-hung raises orphans to be his personal killers. One such is Chik Ming-sing who now wants to put his killer life behind him. Now they will team up to destroy the evil clan.
